expect: Fix reward channel #5: expand compact.py citation scan to include .py/.sh tool files. 471 tool-file lesson references currently invisible. L-601 has 50 tool refs at 0 survival credit. Predicts: action-producing lessons get higher Sharpe, shifting selection pressure from markdown-presence to code-usage. Reward alignment 16.7%→33.3%. Falsified if Sharpe reordering affects <10 lessons.
actual: 277/1076 lessons (25.7%) gained tool-citation bonuses. Median Sharpe tool-cited=0.1679 vs non-tool=0.0686 (2.45x). L-601 gained 67 tool citations (total 891, Sharpe 7.55). L-1127 gained 13 tool citations. Bottom-15 compaction candidates unchanged (no tool refs). Ghost detection still functional. Two colony baselines improved: reward alignment 16.7%→33.3% (Ch5 fixed), session uniformity broken (tool-first session). Goodhart 1975 externally grounded.
diff: Predicted Sharpe reordering affects ≥10 lessons: CONFIRMED (277 lessons affected, 2.45x differential). Predicted reward alignment improvement: CONFIRMED. Unexpected: bottom-15 candidates unchanged — tool-citation impact is protective (keeps important lessons from falling), not disruptive (doesn't rescue already-orphaned lessons). This is correct behavior: orphaned lessons have no tool refs because they never informed mechanisms.
